/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/dev-libs/xpathselect/src=/usr/src/debug/xpathselect -flto=auto -fPIC -Wall -Wl,--no-undefined -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/xpathselect.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libxpathselect.so.1.4 -o libxpathselect.so.1.4 CMakeFiles/xpathselect.dir/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xpathselect.dir/xpathselect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xpathselect.dir/parser.cpp.o
